title: WWOO Islands Dimension
description: WWOO Islands Dimension is an addon for William Wythers Overhauled Overworld, which add a new dimension of floating islands, using the WWOO biomes.
body:
WWOO Islands Dimension worldgen is an addon for **[William Wythers Overhauled Overworld](https://modrinth.com/datapack/william-wythers-overhauled-overworld-(datapack))**, which add a dimension with WWOO floating islands. Travel between dimension by flying in the sky (require elytra, or any flying engine). ### If you prefer to directly modify the overworld, instead of adding a dimension, look at [WWOO Islands](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wwoo-islands). ## Installation - Download this datapack - Download the official [William Wythers Overhauled Overworld](https://modrinth.com/datapack/william-wythers-overhauled-overworld-datapack). - Create a new world and drag the datapacks upon world’s creation. - Put the **WWOO Islands Dimension** on top (above WWOO). - Make sure the spawn is correct, or replace it with _/setworldspawn_ and _/spawnpoint_ . ## Islands densities (Patreon feature) You can chose islands density between 5 values: tiny, small, medium, large and massive. A different datapack can be downloaded for each density.
Patreon Supporters - **1.21.11 (28/01/2026):** Azerxim, Setsu-P, varinyc, nfnpgllxhn - **1.21.9 v1 (15/10/2025):** CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, varinyc, Setsu-P, Wani P, Lionel Felke
Patreon Version The free versions are designed to be fun and fully playable. The Patreon version is for players and server owners who want more control, comfort, and flexibility through an in-game settings menu to tweak the parameters live, without file editing. Becoming a Gold Patreon also means: - Getting access to every Patreon versions of every projects. - Getting your name listed in each project and on this page (see above). - Supporting long-term development, updates, and new features 💛
